message: Research complete: Analysis confirms per-step task creation is required to fix audit trail gap. The orchestrator currently uses a single task_id for all steps, but each step needs its own background_tasks row created before dispatch. Key findings: 1) create_retry_task() pattern already exists and provides task chaining insights, 2) _check_case_resolved() guard pattern already exists, 3) No schema changes required - all needed columns already exist. Required fix: create create_step_task() in utils/background_task_helpers.py and update verification_orchestrator.py step loop to track current_task_id and create step-specific tasks before dispatch.
